info.title: Voyant Operator API
info.description: Generated from the composed operator app. Do not edit by hand.

200.description: Paginated action ledger entries (alias for GET /entries)

400.description: invalid_request — `cursorOccurredAt` and `cursorId` must be provided together; `targetId` and `targetIds` are mutually exclusive
invalid_request — `cursorOccurredAt` and `cursorId` must be provided together; `targetId` and `targetIds` are mutually exclusive

requestBody.description: Reversal action to append against the original ledger entry, plus an optional reversal-state projection.

200.description: The original and appended reversal action

409.description: Action ledger entry cannot be reversed

200.description: An action ledger entry with mutation/sensitive details, payloads, and relay rows

400.description: invalid_request — `cursorCreatedAt` and `cursorId` must be provided together

requestBody.description: The requested action plus the approval policy snapshot. Replays the existing approval when the requested action's idempotency key already exists.

201.description: The requested action and the created (or replayed) approval

200.description: An action approval with its requested action detail

requestBody.description: The decision (status + decider) plus the decision action to append. Conflicts when the approval has already been decided.

200.description: The decided approval and the appended decision action

409.description: Action approval has already been decided

400.description: invalid_request — `cursorCreatedAt` and `cursorId` must be provided together
invalid_request — `cursorCreatedAt` and `cursorId` must be provided together

get.description: Dashboard KPI aggregates over availability slots, served from a read-through TTL snapshot (#1629). The optional `from`/`to` ISO-datetime query window is anchored on each slot's `startsAt`.

Availability operations overview — open / constrained slot counts, active rule and pickup-point counts, products lacking upcoming departures, and the next constrained slots needing attention (`attentionLimit`, default 4).

requestBody.description: Extra price rule. `pricingMode` uses the addon pricing-mode domain (incl. `unavailable`). Sell/cost amount semantics depend on `pricingMode`; the server enforces the conditional rule and returns a clean 400 on violation.

200.description: An extra price rule by id

requestBody.description: Extra price rule patch. `pricingMode` uses the addon pricing-mode domain (incl. `unavailable`). Sell/cost amount semantics depend on `pricingMode`; the server enforces the conditional rule and returns a clean 400 on violation.

200.description: Paginated list of departure price overrides
A departure price override by id

requestBody.description: Discount fields are conditional on `discountType` (enforced server-side; violations return a 400 `invalid_request`): `percentage` requires `discountPercent` and must omit `discountAmountCents`/`currency`; `fixed_amount` requires `discountAmountCents` + `currency` and must omit `discountPercent`. These cross-field rules can't be expressed structurally in JSON Schema, so the body schema is a permissive superset.

Partial update. When `discountType` is supplied, the same conditional rules as create apply (enforced server-side, 400 `invalid_request` on violation): `percentage` requires `discountPercent` and omits `discountAmountCents`/`currency`; `fixed_amount` requires `discountAmountCents` + `currency` and omits `discountPercent`. These cross-field rules aren't structurally representable in JSON Schema.

200.description: The id of the deleted promotional offer

409.description: Offer has redemptions and cannot be deleted

200.description: Search results for the requested vertical slice

400.description: invalid_request — body failed validation, or `vertical` is missing

503.description: Search indexer is not configured for this deployment

201.description: The created room block (starts in `inquiry`; nights are set separately)

200.description: The room block header plus its derived pickup summary

requestBody.description: Upsert the held inventory (and optional rate overrides) per night. Only `roomsHeld` and the rate overrides are caller-controlled; the pickup / release counters are owned by the lifecycle actions and never set here.

200.description: The recomputed block summary after the nights upsert

requestBody.description: Record a pickup against the block. Idempotent on `stayBookingItemId`: re-processing the same stay item returns the existing active pickup with a 200 instead of a 201.

200.description: An existing active pickup (idempotent replay on `stayBookingItemId`)

409.description: The block is no longer accepting pickups, or a night has insufficient inventory (the latter carries a `detail` with the short night)

requestBody.description: Reverse a pickup (booking cancelled / rooms reduced). Exactly one of `pickupId` or `stayBookingItemId` is required; the body schema enforces this, so a request with neither (or both) fails request validation with a 400 `invalid_request`. A well-formed request whose pickup isn't found (or belongs to a different block) returns 404.

400.description: Invalid body — neither (or both) of `pickupId`/`stayBookingItemId` supplied

404.description: Active pickup not found (or it belongs to a different block)

200.description: Unpicked rooms released back to the property; the block moves to `released`

post.description: Mark a session as requiring a provider redirect. Requires `redirectUrl`; the other provider/reference fields are optional.

Mark a session complete (authorized/paid). Accepts an optional JSON body (all fields optional; an empty body is accepted) with: `status` (authorized|paid, default paid), `providerSessionId`, `providerPaymentId`, `externalReference`, `paymentMethod`, `paymentInstrumentId`, `captureMode`, `externalAuthorizationId`, `externalCaptureId`, `approvalCode`, `authorizedAt`, `capturedAt`, `settledAt`, `paymentDate`, `expiresAt`, `referenceNumber`, `notes`, `providerPayload`, `metadata`. The body is parsed in the handler (not a declared OpenAPI request body) because Hono's JSON validator would reject a zero-length `application/json` request.

409.description: The session cannot be completed from its current state

post.description: Mark a session failed. Accepts an optional JSON body (all fields optional; an empty body is accepted) with: `providerSessionId`, `providerPaymentId`, `externalReference`, `failureCode`, `failureMessage`, `notes`, `providerPayload`, `metadata`. The body is parsed in the handler (not a declared OpenAPI request body) because Hono's JSON validator would reject a zero-length `application/json` request.

Cancel a session. Accepts an optional JSON body (all fields optional; an empty body is accepted) with: `notes`, `providerPayload`, `metadata`, `cancelledAt`. The body is parsed in the handler (not a declared OpenAPI request body) because Hono's JSON validator would reject a zero-length `application/json` request.

Expire a session. Accepts an optional JSON body (all fields optional; an empty body is accepted) with: `notes`, `providerPayload`, `metadata`, `expiredAt`. The body is parsed in the handler (not a declared OpenAPI request body) because Hono's JSON validator would reject a zero-length `application/json` request.

200.description: Outstanding invoice balances bucketed by age
Per-departure P&L as a CSV download for accountant sharing
Per-product P&L as a CSV download for accountant sharing

201.description: The created accountant share + its public url

400.description: invalid_request: request body failed validation, or payment validation failed

409.description: Action-ledger idempotency conflict, or payment validation conflict

requestBody.description: Default payment-plan options. Every field is optional / defaulted, so a posted `{}` applies the default deposit/balance split.

201.description: The created payment schedules for the applied plan

400.description: invalid_request: request body failed validation, or payment validation failed

409.description: Payment validation conflict

requestBody.description: Payment-session provisioning options. Every field is optional, so a posted `{}` provisions a session for the schedule amount.

409.description: Unable to create payment session

requestBody.description: Payment-session provisioning options. Every field is optional, so a posted `{}` provisions a session for the guarantee amount.

409.description: Unable to create payment session

404.description: Booking item tax line not found
Booking item tax line not found

200.description: Unified list of customer + supplier payments

get.description: Look up a single payment by id. Dispatches by typeid prefix: `spay_*` → supplier payment, `pay_*` → customer payment.

patch.description: Update a customer payment. Recomputes the invoice's paid/balance/status from the remaining completed payments. Supplier payments (`spay_*` id) must be updated via `/supplier-payments/{id}` and return 400 here.

400.description: invalid_request, or a supplier payment id was supplied

delete.description: Remove a customer payment, recomputing invoice totals the same way PATCH does. Supplier payments (`spay_*` id) must be deleted via `/supplier-payments/{id}` and return 400 here.

400.description: A supplier payment id was supplied

200.description: Paginated list of invoices (each row carries its linked payment-schedule ids)

requestBody.description: Create + issue an invoice or proforma from a booking (and optionally a payment schedule). `invoiceType` selects invoice vs proforma; `bookingPaymentScheduleId`, when present, must belong to the booking.

404.description: Booking or booking payment schedule not found

409.description: Invoice number allocation failed, the invoice number already exists, or the booking failed issuance validation

post.description: Convert a proforma to a final invoice. Accepts optional overrides (`invoiceNumber`, `issueDate`, `dueDate`) as a JSON body; an empty or absent body is accepted. The body is parsed in the handler (not as a declared OpenAPI request body) because Hono's JSON validator would reject a zero-length `application/json` request before the handler runs.

409.description: The invoice is not a proforma, has already been converted, or a duplicate fiscal invoice already exists

200.description: An invoice by id (with the proforma→final-invoice link, if any)

400.description: Only draft invoices can be deleted

post.description: Void an invoice. Accepts an optional `voidReason` JSON body; an empty or absent body is accepted. The body is parsed in the handler (not as a declared OpenAPI request body) because Hono's JSON validator would reject a zero-length `application/json` request before the handler runs.

400.description: invalid_request, or the invoice is a draft (delete it instead)

409.description: Invoice cannot be voided: already void, invalid status, or it has payments / credit notes

201.description: The created payment session for the invoice balance

409.description: The invoice is paid/void or has no outstanding balance

400.description: invalid_request, or the payment failed business-rule validation

409.description: The payment conflicts with the invoice state (e.g. overpayment)

201.description: The created credit note line item

200.description: Paginated list of invoice number series
An invoice number series by id

409.description: Invoice number series is inactive

requestBody.description: Invoice template patch. `slug` must be kebab-case (`^[a-z0-9-]+$`).

200.description: Paginated list of tax policy profiles
A tax policy profile by id
Paginated list of tax policy rules
A tax policy rule by id

requestBody.description: Rendition request (`format`, `templateId`, etc.). `wait` (query or body) makes the request block for a ready rendition up to `waitTimeoutMs`; when set, a still-pending rendition returns 202.

201.description: The rendition (with a signed `download` when a wait resolved to a ready, downloadable file)

202.description: The wait timed out before the rendition was ready

302.description: Redirect to the signed inline download URL

404.description: Attachment not found, or its file is not available

501.description: The document download resolver is not configured

409.description: The voucher code is already in use

201.description: The redemption (updated voucher + the recorded redemption row)

409.description: The voucher has insufficient remaining balance

422.description: The voucher is inactive, not yet started, or expired

200.description: The supplier invoice (with its lines + allocations)
The updated supplier invoice (with its lines + allocations)
The id of the soft-deleted supplier invoice

200.description: The supplier invoice with its replaced cost allocations

302.description: Redirect to the signed document download URL

200.description: A page of the supplier invoice's payments

302.description: Redirect to the signed attachment download URL

404.description: Attachment not found, or its file is not available

501.description: The document download resolver is not configured

post.description: Generate the invoice document. Accepts an OPTIONAL JSON body with the rendition options (`templateId`, `language`, `format`, `publicDelivery`, `publicDeliveryTtlSeconds`); a missing/empty body renders with defaults.

201.description: The generated rendition (with signed download envelopes when available)

501.description: The invoice document generator is not configured

post.description: Regenerate the invoice document. Accepts an OPTIONAL JSON body with the rendition options (`templateId`, `language`, `format`, `publicDelivery`, `publicDeliveryTtlSeconds`); a missing/empty body regenerates with defaults.

200.description: The regenerated rendition (with signed download envelopes when available)

501.description: The invoice document generator is not configured

302.description: Redirect to the signed rendition download URL

404.description: Invoice rendition not found, or its file is not available

501.description: The document download resolver is not configured

201.description: The created booking with its travelers, schedules, invoice, and payments

400.description: invalid_request: body failed validation, payment schedules invalid, the payload did not match the resolved draft, or the selected rooms cannot seat the party

404.description: Product, voucher, or booking group not found

409.description: Conflict: duplicate booking, voucher state conflict, or booking already in a group

400.description: invalid_request: body failed validation, or one sub-booking failed a 400-class precondition (the failing side is named via `which` + `reasonStatus`)

409.description: A sub-booking hit a duplicate / voucher / already-in-group conflict

500.description: Group linking failed for a sub-booking

200.description: Quote for the entity at the requested scope

404.description: Quote/order referenced by the engine was not found

409.description: Quote expired or conflicts with current availability

503.description: No adapter/handler registered for this vertical

requestBody.description: Either `quoteId` or `draftId` is required (cross-field rule enforced server-side; the schema is a permissive superset).

200.description: Booking committed for the resolved quote

400.description: invalid_request — body failed validation, or quoteId could not be resolved

409.description: Draft has no current quote, quote expired/mismatched, or order conflict

503.description: No adapter/handler registered for this vertical

400.description: invalid_request — body failed validation, or entityModule/entityId missing on create

409.description: Hold conflicts with current availability

409.description: Hold conflicts with current availability
